mapper.sql: kaiB.id, kaiB.kpi_assessment_indicators_id, kaiB.BBS_content, kaiB.create_name, kaiB.create_by, kaiB.create_time, kaiB.update_by, kaiB.update_time, kaiB.enabled_flag

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.kpi_assessment_indicators_id as ${tAlias}_kpi_assessment_indicators_id, ${tAlias}.BBS_content as ${tAlias}_BBS_content, ${tAlias}.create_name as ${tAlias}_create_name, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag

where 1 = 1 and enabled_flag = 1
and kaiB.kpi_assessment_indicators_id like #{criteria.kpiAssessmentIndicatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into kpi_assessment_indicators_BBS (kpi_assessment_indicators_id, BBS_content, create_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, enabled_flag) values (#{kpiAssessmentIndicatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{bbsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, 1)
mapper.update: update kpi_assessment_indicators_BBS set id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, kpi_assessment_indicators_id = #{kpiAssessmentIndicatorsId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, BBS_content = #{bbsContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_name = #{createName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}
